speaker: Travis Miller
event: AI for a Better Future Hackathon
subject: Invitation: Judge the AI for a Better Future Hackathon at Cal Poly Pomona
body:
Dear Travis,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out on behalf of the Cal Poly Pomona Mitchell C. Hill Center regarding an exciting opportunity that aligns perfectly with your expertise in data collection and MR technology innovation.

The AI for a Better Future Hackathon is an annual event that brings together business and technology students to solve real-world challenges using AI. We're looking for experienced industry judges, and your background as SVP of Sales & Client Development at PureSpectrum makes you an ideal candidate.

Event Details:
- Event: AI for a Better Future Hackathon
- Role: Judge
- Location: Cal Poly Pomona, Pomona, CA
- Audience: Business and tech students

As IA West President, your participation would also strengthen the connection between the Insights Association and the next generation of market research professionals.

Would you be available to participate? I'd be happy to share more details about the judging criteria and time commitment.

Best regards,
[IA West SmartMatch Platform]
